task_completion.description: Calculate interviewee ages using the YEAR formula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column (e.g., 'Age at Interview') containing numerical ages calculated from the Birth Year and Interview Date.

task_completion.description: Create an archive readiness validation formula using AND logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column (e.g., 'Ready for Archive?') showing boolean or Yes/No results based on Transcription Status, Release Form Signed, Topic Tags, and Interview Date.

task_completion.description: Apply conditional formatting to identify errors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells or rows highlighted with specific colors indicating errors or incomplete status (e.g., missing tags, unsigned forms).

task_completion.description: Sort the records to prioritize incomplete entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet rows are sorted such that incomplete or non-archive-ready records appear at the top.

integrity.description: Agent used actual formulas rather than hardcoding values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 10 records. The archive readiness formula must check: Transcription Status='Complete' AND Release Form Signed='Yes' AND Topic Tags not empty AND Interview Date not empty. Exactly 5 records should evaluate to 'Yes' (archive ready) and 5 to 'No' (incomplete). Birth years range from 1927-1945. Expected new columns are: Interview Date (Standardized), Age at Interview, Ready for Archive?.
